scripts.validate-config: node --eval "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const dir=path.join(process.cwd(),'examples'); for (const name of fs.readdirSync(dir)) { if (!name.endsWith('.json')) continue; const file=path.join(dir,name); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')); console.log('validated', path.relative(process.cwd(), file)); }"
